title: Tellurium's Random Stuff
body:
This mod is a collection of mostly non-thematic additions that tries to make your life easier. ## Features This list refers to the 1.7.0 version, in previous version this features may differ or be absent.
Soul Sand and Magma Block with Grate -Similar to its vanilla counterparts except that it doesn't have the various effect that entities get when walking on it
-Still make bubble columns underwater
![image](https://i.imgur.com/u4cH4Bk.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/smojRKl.png)
Hydrodynamic Rails -New type of rail that work similar to powered rails except its activated by being waterlogged
-If not waterlogged slows down the cart
-When powered it can go faster than powered rails ![image](https://i.imgur.com/J7v1QiZ.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/DAel0Dx.png)
Opal -A shiny rock that comes with different colors
-You can find it in large clusters underground
![image](https://i.imgur.com/C9Jpd4P.png)
Infused Soul Sand -A soul powered soul sand block
-Requires a small soul fragment to craft (see the soul fragment section)
-Used to make soul lava (see below)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/F2omvhO.png)
Soul Lava -A new type of fluid made by filtering lava with infused soul sand
-Has similar properties to lava but it doesn't do damage to skeletons
-Put an empty cauldron underneath the soul sand to collect it
-When the cauldron is filled the lava is consumed, the infused soul sand also has a chance to convert to regular soul sand
![image](https://i.imgur.com/vuqhXO6.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/z7gBbxu.png)
Soul Magma Blocks -Crafted by throwing a magma block inside a cauldron filled with soul lava, or with soul infusion (see the soul infuser section)
-Only skeleton-type mobs can spawn on it
-Skeletons that walk on it don't take fire damage
-It activates the soul speed enchantment
-Also has a variant with grate and generates bubble columns underwater
![image](https://i.imgur.com/QAHJPvY.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/7ZPp5w8.png)
Soul Magma Bricks -Decorative blocks crafted with soul magma blocks
-Allow only skeleton-type mob to spawn on it
-Unlike soul magma blocks doesn't damage entities that walk on it
-Has a slab variant ![image](https://i.imgur.com/PFRHAKQ.png)
Soul Furnace -A special furnace that use soul lava as fuel
-Can smelt four items at a time and is faster than the vanilla furnace
-Unlike vanilla furnaces, it stores soul lava in its tank and ignites only if there's a valid item to smelt in one of the input slot
-If a soul furnace gets broken the soul lava stored inside is lost so remember to use it all before breaking it
![image](https://i.imgur.com/oNPiOMd.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/hlt1Met.png)
Soul Fragments -Dropped by killing mobs with a sword enchanted with Soul Harvesting
-Soul Harvesting is a new treasure enchantment with max 3 levels, each level increase the drop chance of soul fragments (also stacks with Looting)
-Hostile mob and bosses drop more fragments
Soul Infuser -A block used to transmute items into other items using soul power
-Has lots of usefull recipes
-Each recipes has its own soul lava cost, use Jei to check
-Like the soul furnace the soul lava inside is lost if it gets broken
![image](https://i.imgur.com/ltnMYyb.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/45Vy6OQ.png)
Soul Compactor -Compact items with soul power
-Has lots of usefull recipes
-Each recipes has its own soul lava cost, use Jei to check
-Like the soul furnace the soul lava inside is lost if it gets broken
![image](https://i.imgur.com/GcCJZ61.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/v0vRWBc.png)
Soul Anchor -A block that allows the player to recover their inventory upon death
-Activated by right-clicking it with a Totem of Binding (the totem is consumed)
-When a player who has activated a Soul Anchor dies, their inventory is not dropped but instead 'saved'. To recover it, open the anchor's GUI, and the anchor will lose its charge.
-The saved inventory can be lost if the player dies again before recovering the previous inventory or if the anchor is broken while charged
-Charged state can be read with a comparator
![image](https://i.imgur.com/JyZq3c5.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/2OgkGBd.png)
Alchemixer -Mix potions using soul lava
-Mixing two potions of the same type upgrade its level or increase its durability
-Allows to obtain stronger potions than vanilla like regeneration 3 or potions longer than 8 minutes
-Mixing two potions with different effects combines them in a single potions
-Mixing cost increases the more powerful potions are mixed
![image](https://i.imgur.com/zKFpBxi.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/gNFSH0b.png)
Extractor -A dipenser like block that extracts items from a connected inventory behind it and drops them in front of itself
-It functions exactly like a dropper, activated by a redstone signal
-It has three slots in its inventory that act as filters where items can be placed, the extractor will only take items that match those present in its inventory
![image](https://i.imgur.com/ruH2VFr.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/GQz4AvD.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/nrVM4px.png)
Item Pedestal -Block used to display items
-Right-click to insert and retrieve items (similar to item frames)
-Use a name tag on it to make it display the item name
![image](https://i.imgur.com/uBsKHVl.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/6AOCmiu.png)
Bright and Soul Torchflower -Variants of the torchflower plant
-Emits light unlike its vanilla counterpart
-Can be placed in pots
![image](https://i.imgur.com/JGNw0m0.png)
Lava Googles -Allows to see inside lava more clearly
-Can be colored by crafting it with dyes like with leather armor
-It does not offer any fire protection by itself, use fire resistance potions!
![image](https://i.imgur.com/NOiryq3.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/C7FiP39.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/pfN79BU.png)
Spirited Iron -Upgraded iron ingot crafted by soul infusing iron
-Used to make tools and armor
![image](https://i.imgur.com/NIDrUya.png)
Grappling Hook -Used to jump around and climb heights faster
-Charge it by holding right-click and throw it at a block
-Once it hits a block press right-click to get pulled towards it, or shift + right-click to retrieve it without being pulled
-Press right-click again while being pulled to retrieve it
-Can be enchanted with the Aerodynamics enchantment (up to level 3) to be able to launch it further
-Careful about fall damage! Boots with feather falling recommended
![image](https://i.imgur.com/rc1kjMj.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/OhpnW40.png)
Floating Walkway -Walkable block that can be placed on water source blocks, even without a support block (similar to lily pads)
-Sinks slightly in water when stepped on by a living entity
-Available in all wood types
![image](https://i.imgur.com/BEdH9Id.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/LeCETBf.png)
Blue Glowstone -New variant of glowstone
-Only found in soul sand valleys
![image](https://i.imgur.com/cjU7h7n.png)
Blue Redstone Lamp and Soul Jack o'Lantern -Decorative blocks that emits light
![image](https://i.imgur.com/rxTBu6z.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/qSq8f16.png)
Awakened Sculk Shrieker -A variant of the sculk shrieker
-Allows to summon a Warden anywhere even if placed by a player
-To spawn a Warden right-click it with a soul cluster (crafted with soul fragments), the cluster is consumed
-After a succesfull spawn it goes dormant for a while before awakening again (the dormant time can be changed in the config)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/rgqfUGM.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/7uSbqRa.png)
Ancient City -A new structure that spawn in the deep dark, similar to ancient cities
-It contains some interesting loot
![image](https://i.imgur.com/Qo6yVMM.png) ![image](https://i.imgur.com/G25gWiC.png)
Dispenser can interact with cauldrons -Added an interaction where dispensers can fill and empty cauldrons in front of them using buckets
-Allows to automate lava and soul lava production
-Can be disabled in the config file
Zombie Horse Rider -During village zombie sieges, there is a chance for a zombie rider to spawn
-This allows players to obtain a zombie horse in survival mode
-The spawn chance can be adjusted using configs (default is 25%)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/JAy1SwL.png)
Riptide from water cauldrons -Trident enchanted with riptide can be used to launch when standing inside a water cauldrons
-Useful to use riptide inside the nether
-Can be disabled in the config
Allays duplication with echo shards -Items present in the new allay_duplication_items tag can be used to duplicate allays similar to amethyst shards
-Echo shards are present in the tag by default
-Can be disabled in the config
This are all the features currently present in the mod, I'm probably gonna add or change some stuff in the future. If you find problems or bugs please report them on the issue tracker on GitHub.
